basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Faculty, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central Bank of India (CBI) has officially announced the Faculty, Office Assistant, Attendant, and Watchman Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website https://www.centralbankofindia.co.in. Candidates aged between 22 and 40 years and holding qualifications such as Graduate (any stream; preference for MSW/MA in Rural Development/Sociology/Psychology/B.Sc. in Veterinary, Horticulture, Agriculture, Agri Marketing/B.A with B.Ed.) for Faculty, Graduate (B.S.W/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge) for Office Assistant, Matriculate for Attendant,

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (any i.e. Science/Commerce/Arts/Post Graduate; preference to MSW/MA in Rural Dev./MA in Sociology/Psychology/B.Sc. (Veterinary, Horticulture, Agriculture, Agri Marketing)/B.A with B.Ed.) for Faculty, Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge for Office Assistant, Matriculate for Attendant, Passed 7th Standard for Watchman/Gardener
qualification.details: Attendant: Shall be a Matriculate Watchman/Gardener: Should have passed 7th Standard Faculty: Shall be a Graduate (any i.e. Science/Commerce/Arts/Post Graduate; however preference will be given to MSW/MA in Rural Dev. /MA in Sociology /Psychology /B.Sc. (Veterinary, Horticulture, Agriculture, Agri Marketing)/B.A with B.Ed. Office Assistant: Shall be a Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge.

salary_details.pay_scale: Faculty: Rs. 30000/month, Office Assistant: Rs. 20000/month, Attendant: Rs. 14000/month, Watchman/Gardener: Rs. 12000/month
salary_details.details: Faculty: Rs. 30000/month Office Assistant: Rs. 20000/month Attendant: Rs. 14000/month Watchman/Gardener: Rs. 12000/month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
